items.label: This Week
items.value: Tinkering with this very website — yes, the one you're reading right now.

items.label: Between Gigs
items.value: Between contracts, building something big. If you already know what it is, congratulations — you're one of the lucky few. If not, you'll find out soon enough.

items.label: G&G
items.value: His own TTRPG system — rules and setting built in parallel, because one impossible project at a time was never his style.

items.label: On the Desk
items.value: Grey Knights — the next squad's primed and ready for paint. He might even play them this time.

items.label: Homebrew Ravenloft Arc
items.value: The players broke the plot. Again. The arc just wrapped, and he's already plotting the next one.
